message.content:
I need to retrieve the ORIGINAL (pre-dark-theme) versions of CSS files from git. Run these commands to get the original content from the last commit:

1. `git show HEAD:src/styles/variables.css` — the original light theme tokens
2. `git show HEAD:src/styles/global.css` — original globals
3. `git show HEAD:index.html` — original font import
4. `git show HEAD:src/ui/Toolbar.module.css` — original toolbar styles
5. `git show HEAD:src/ui/Sidebar.module.css` — original sidebar styles
6. `git show HEAD:src/ui/Toolbar.jsx` — original toolbar JSX (before group labels were added)

Show me the full content of each file. Working directory: C:\Users\johnm\modular apartment planner

content.text: I'll retrieve the original versions of these files from git for you.

input.command: cd "/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner" && git show HEAD:src/styles/variables.css
cd "/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner" && git show HEAD:src/styles/global.css
cd "/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner" && git show HEAD:index.html
cd "/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner" && git show HEAD:src/ui/Toolbar.module.css
cd "/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner" && git show HEAD:src/ui/Sidebar.module.css
cd "/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner" && git show HEAD:src/ui/Toolbar.jsx
